info.title: PRRM API
info.description: Portfolio Research & Risk Management (PRRM) REST API. Provides endpoints for strategy management, instrument tracking, screening, research, valuation, investment-committee workflows, portfolio analytics, risk monitoring, notifications and system administration.

tags.name: Performance
tags.description: Portfolio performance metrics, attribution and reports

BearerAuth.description: Optional Bearer token for authenticated requests.

content.description: Markdown content of the strategy document

title.example: AAPL Initiation: Strong moat, fair valuation

template.description: JSON template defining model inputs and formula

inputData.description: Key-value input assumptions for the model

orderedIds.description: Agenda item IDs in desired order

fxRate.description: FX rate to base currency; defaults to 1.0

get.description: Returns the latest version of the investment strategy document.

put.description: Replaces the strategy content and creates a new version.

get.description: Returns all historical versions of the strategy document.
Returns a specific historical version of the strategy.
Search and filter the instrument master list.

post.description: Add a new instrument to the master list.

get.description: Returns full detail for a single instrument including external IDs.

patch.description: Partially update an instrument's fields.

get.description: Returns all comments for a given instrument.

post.description: Add a comment to an instrument.
Add an external identifier (e.g. Bloomberg, Reuters) to an instrument.

delete.description: Delete an external identifier from an instrument.

get.description: Searches the Börsdata instrument registry by name or ticker and returns enriched metadata.
Searches Yahoo Finance for instruments with enriched quote and sector data.
Returns Börsdata classification metadata: countries, markets, sectors, and branches.
Returns available Börsdata KPIs, optionally filtered by category or search query.
Returns all saved screening profiles.

post.description: Create a new screening profile with criteria.

get.description: Returns a single screening profile with its criteria.

patch.description: Partially update a screening profile.

post.description: Execute the screening profile against the current instrument universe.

get.description: Evaluates a specific instrument against all criteria in a screening profile, returning per-criterion pass/fail results with actual values and thresholds.
Retrieve the results of a completed screening run.

post.description: Creates instruments in the registry from selected screening run results.
Executes the pipeline. Auto-triggers stale profiles. Supports dryRun.

get.description: Returns instruments from the current committed universe version.

patch.description: Deprecated. Use propose/commit workflow instead.

post.description: Creates a proposal from an intersection run with delta tracking.

201.description: Created proposal with instruments and delta summary

get.description: Returns proposal with instruments and delta summary.

post.description: Override-retain a dropped instrument with rationale.

put.description: Atomically replace the current universe with the confirmed proposal.

get.description: Returns the latest committed universe version with instruments and staleness info.
Paginated list of all committed universe versions.
Returns a specific universe version with all instruments.
Compares two versions returning added, removed, and retained instruments.
Returns all override instruments in the current universe.

post.description: Adds an instrument as an override to the current universe, creating a new version. The instrument can be sourced from Börsdata, Yahoo Finance, or entered manually.

201.description: Override added, new universe version created

post.description: Creates PRRM instruments for universe instruments that don't have one yet. Accepts universe version instrument IDs.

get.description: Returns instruments with active portfolio positions not in the current universe.
Returns days since the last intersection run that fed the current universe.
Returns research reports with optional filters.

post.description: Create a new research report.

get.description: Returns full detail of a single research report.

patch.description: Partially update a research report.

get.description: Returns all comments on a research report.

post.description: Add a comment to a research report.
Searches research reports using semantic similarity (vector embeddings).

get.description: Returns all saved valuation model templates.

post.description: Create a new valuation model template.

get.description: Returns a single valuation model template.

patch.description: Partially update a valuation model template.

post.description: Run a valuation model against an instrument with given input assumptions.

get.description: Returns a single valuation execution output.
Returns valuation outputs for a given instrument.
Returns all Investment Committee meetings.

post.description: Schedule a new Investment Committee meeting.

get.description: Returns a single IC meeting with agenda, minutes and decisions.

patch.description: Update the status or date of an IC meeting.

post.description: Add an item to the IC meeting agenda.

patch.description: Update the title, description or sort order of an agenda item.

delete.description: Delete an agenda item from a meeting.

post.description: Set the display order of agenda items for a meeting.

get.description: Returns all pre-read documents attached to an agenda item.

post.description: Attach a new pre-read document to an agenda item.

get.description: Returns a single pre-read document.

patch.description: Update a pre-read document.

delete.description: Remove a pre-read document from an agenda item.

post.description: Create the initial minutes for an IC meeting.

patch.description: Update the minutes of an existing IC meeting.

get.description: Returns all Investment Committee decisions.

post.description: Record a new decision from an IC meeting.

patch.description: Update the execution status of a decision.

get.description: Returns all current portfolio positions.
Returns the position for a specific instrument.

patch.description: Manually set the current price for a position (for unlisted/alternative assets).
Assign a position to a sub-portfolio sleeve. Pass null to unassign.

get.description: Returns trade history, optionally filtered by instrument.

post.description: Record a new trade execution.

patch.description: Update a trade. If instrumentId changes, the position is rebuilt from all remaining trades.

delete.description: Delete a trade and rebuild the position from remaining trades for that instrument.

post.description: Upload a broker CSV (UTF-16 LE, tab-separated, columns: Namn, Valuta, Antal, GAV, ..., Värde SEK) to import positions. Searches Börsdata then Yahoo Finance to match instruments, creates missing instruments, and registers Buy trades. Set replace=true to delete all existing trades first.

replace.description: If true, deletes all existing trades and positions before importing

get.description: Returns high-level portfolio metrics: total value, PnL, position count, cash.
Returns portfolio allocation grouped by a chosen dimension.
Returns the portfolio's currency exposure breakdown.
Returns portfolio config: name, base currency, margin limit.

patch.description: Update portfolio name, base currency, or margin limit.

post.description: Upload broker CSV and create a pending import session for review.

get.description: Returns an import session with all rows for review.

patch.description: Edit a row in a pending import session (instrument, shares, price, FX rate, etc.).

post.description: Commit a reviewed import session, registering all matched rows as trades.
Upload a Nordnet transaction export CSV to replay full transaction history. PM-only, not exposed via MCP.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: If true, parse and match instruments without committing

get.description: Returns cash balances per currency per sub-portfolio.
Returns paginated cash transaction ledger.

patch.description: Update a manual cash transaction (deposit, withdrawal, margin_draw, margin_repay). Trade-linked transactions cannot be edited.

delete.description: Delete a manual cash transaction. Trade-linked transactions cannot be deleted.

post.description: Record a cash deposit into the portfolio.
Record a cash withdrawal from the portfolio.

get.description: Returns margin facility limit, used, available, and equity.
Returns all sub-portfolios (sleeves).

post.description: Create a new sub-portfolio sleeve.

get.description: Returns all sleeves with position counts, values, P&L, and exposure breakdowns.
Returns a single sub-portfolio by ID.

patch.description: Update a sub-portfolio name, description, or sort order.

delete.description: Delete a sub-portfolio. Fails if it has existing trades.

get.description: Returns dividends with optional filters. Use ?view=summary for summary, ?view=forecast for forecast.

post.description: Record a dividend payment for an instrument.
Fetch dividend calendar from Börsdata and auto-record past dividends for held positions.

get.description: Returns realized P&L from sell trades with optional date and sub-portfolio filters.
Returns the latest portfolio risk metrics and any active alerts.
Returns risk reports with optional date and type filters.

post.description: Create and publish a new risk report.

get.description: Returns a single risk report.
Returns all configured risk alert triggers.

post.description: Create a new risk alert trigger.

patch.description: Partially update a risk alert trigger.

delete.description: Permanently delete a risk alert trigger.

get.description: Returns all risk alert events.

patch.description: Mark a risk alert event as acknowledged.

get.description: Computes VaR, CVaR, portfolio volatility, Sharpe, Sortino, max drawdown, concentration, and exposure using historical price data and @railpath/finance-toolkit.
Returns the pairwise correlation matrix for all held positions computed from historical daily returns.
Returns each position's marginal contribution to portfolio risk from the covariance matrix.

post.description: Simulate percentage shocks to sectors, currencies, or specific instruments and return the portfolio impact.

shocks.description: Map of sector/currency/instrument name to shock decimal (e.g., -0.20 for -20%)

get.description: Returns portfolio performance metrics for a given period including TWR, risk-adjusted metrics, and benchmark comparison.
Returns return attribution by position, sector, or currency.
Returns a time series of periodic returns for trend analysis and charting.
Returns current and historical drawdown information.
Returns published performance reports with optional filters.

post.description: Create and publish a new performance report.

get.description: Returns a single performance report with parsed metrics snapshot.
Returns the currently configured benchmark(s) with instrument details.

post.description: Configure a portfolio benchmark. The instrument must already exist in the system.

get.description: Returns user notifications, optionally filtered to unread only.

parameters.name: unread_only
parameters.description: If true, return only unread notifications

patch.description: Mark a single notification as read.

post.description: Mark every unread notification as read.

get.description: Returns the number of unread notifications.
Search across instruments, research, IC decisions and trades.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Restrict to a specific entity type

get.description: Returns all application settings as key-value pairs.

patch.description: Update a single setting by key.

get.description: Returns the current outbound webhook configuration.

post.description: Send a test event to the configured webhook URL.

get.description: Returns service health status, version and database connectivity.

post.description: Manually trigger the daily portfolio and risk data refresh.
